mapper.insert: INSERT INTO career_analysis_run (user_id, analysis_type, status, input_snapshot, input_fingerprint, result, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, token_usage, error_message, retryable) VALUES (#{userId}, #{analysisType}, #{status}, #{inputSnapshot}, #{inputFingerprint}, #{result}, #{model}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{tokenUsage}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryable})

INSERT INTO ai_usage_log (user_id, feature_type, status, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, token_usage, credit_used, error_message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{featureType}, #{status}, #{model}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{tokenUsage}, #{creditUsed}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM career_analysis_run WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM career_analysis_run ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 300
